title: Grilled Kabanos Sausage
description: A simple and flavorful kabanos sausage recipe, grilled to perfection.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Remove the kabanos sausages from the packaging and pat dry with a paper towel.
Season the sausages with salt to taste.
Place the sausages on the grill and cook for 5-7 minutes per side, or until nicely charred.
While the sausages are cooking, toast the fluffy buns on the grill.
Serve the grilled kabanos sausages in the toasted fluffy buns.
Optional: add additional salty toppings to taste.
